statement: In every magma, Equation 2817 (`x = ((y * z) * (z * w)) * y`) implies Equation 376 (`x * y = (x * x) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0407
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op z w)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op x x) z)
